items.title: NEWS: The Sixers will not tender Tyrese Martin a two-way qualifying offer, making him an unrestricted free agent, source tells @phillyvoice.com.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
NEWS: The Sixers will not tender Tyrese Martin a two-way qualifying offer, making him an unrestricted free agent, source tells @phillyvoice.com.

What the news means for Martin and the Sixers as the team looks at turning over all three of its two-way spots: 

www.phillyvoice.com/sixers-news-...

media.title: Source: Sixers decline to tender two-way qualifying offer to Tyrese Martin, making him an unrestricted free agent
media.description: In nine games with the Sixers on a two-way deal, Allentown native Tyrese Martin averaged 9.0 minutes and 2.2 points.

items.title: Tyrese Martin drills 3 Brooklyn Nets vs. Philadelphia 76ers
items.author: ESPN
items.body_excerpt: Tyrese Martin drills 3 Brooklyn Nets vs. Philadelphia 76ers ESPN
